title: CSS Frameworks Comparison Quiz
description: Evaluate your understanding of Component-Based UI kits (Bootstrap/Bulma) vs Utility-First CSS frameworks (Tailwind).

questions.question: Which and/or what is the primarily role of Bootstrap in a web application?
options: A component-based UI kit for quickly building professional interfaces with standard designs.
To hide the JavaScript code from the console.

questions.question: Which and/or what is the key design philosophy behind Tailwind CSS?
Does Tailwind CSS typically resulted in larger final CSS bundle sizes than Bootstrap?
options: No, as its JIT compiler only generates the exact CSS you use on each page.
Yes, as it has more utilities.

questions.question: Which and/or what framework would you choose if you need a completely unique, custom design with high performance?
Can you use both Bootstrap and Tailwind CSS in the same project together?
options: Yes, but it is not recommended as it adds a lot of redundancy and potential conflicts.
No, only one framework can be used at a time.
